Export a per-concept results table

Source: R/vis.R
lloom_export.Rd

One row per active concept with its criteria, prevalence, and evidence (replaces upstream export_df() / __get_df_for_export()).

Usage

lloom_export(sess, threshold = 1, max_highlights = 3, collapse = FALSE)

Arguments

sess

A lloom_session() after lloom_score().

threshold

Minimum score counting as a match. Default 1.

max_highlights

Maximum highlight quotes kept per concept. Default 3 (as upstream).

collapse

If TRUE, collapse the rep_examples and highlights list columns into single " | "-separated strings, so the table can be written straight to CSV. Default FALSE.

Value

A tibble: concept, criteria, summary, rep_examples (list column: the concept's exemplar documents), prevalence, n_matches, highlights (list column).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
lloom_export(sess)  # after lloom_gen() and lloom_score()

# CSV-safe version (list columns collapsed to text):
readr::write_csv(lloom_export(sess, collapse = TRUE), "concept_summary.csv")
} # }

On this page
